articles.title: Cong wins landslide in civic polls
articles.content: The Congress party has secured a major victory in the recently concluded civic elections in Hyderabad. The party won 120 out of 150 seats, marking a significant shift in the local political landscape. Supporters celebrated across the city as the results were announced late Sunday evening.

articles.title: Hyderabad Tech Hub Expands
articles.content: Leading multi-national companies have announced new investment plans for their Hyderabad offices. This expansion is expected to create over 50,000 new job opportunities within the next two years, further cementing the city's position as a global IT hub.

articles.title: Metro Phase 2 Gets Nod
articles.content: The state government has officially approved the Phase 2 plan for the Hyderabad Metro. This phase will extend the rail network to the outskirts, significantly improving connectivity for daily commuters.

articles.title: Local Hero Shines in Ranji
articles.content: Young batsman from Hyderabad scored a double century against Mumbai in the ongoing Ranji Trophy match. His performance has caught the attention of national selectors.

articles.title: Biryani Festival Starts Friday
articles.content: A three-day Biryani festival is set to begin this weekend at the People's Plaza. Over 50 vendors will showcase different varieties of the city's favorite dish.
